message:
test(franken-node): harden kernel extraction boundary manifest validation

Expand the kernel extraction boundary manifest test harness with:
- REQUIRED_CORE_MODULES constant enumerating the 7 core Rust modules
  (agent_cx, scheduler, hostcall_queue, hostcall_amac, extensions,
  extensions_js, session) that must appear in the manifest
- REQUIRED_BANNED_CROSS_BOUNDARY_PAIRS defining forbidden domain
  interactions (hostcall_execution↔session_orchestration,
  extension_runtime_js↔provider_runtime)
- Refactored module_ownership_index → collect_module_ownership_index
  returning ValidationResult<HashMap> for proper error propagation
- Added core module coverage validation ensuring all required modules
  appear in at least one boundary domain
- Added banned cross-boundary pair validation checking that no domain
  claims ownership of modules from both sides of a forbidden pair
- Introduced ValidationResult type alias for cleaner error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
